title: Random Block Chunk
description: Every chunk is made up of one type of block.
body:
OneBlockChunk is a mod, designed for Baablu. 

Each chunk is made up of 1 singular type of block.
Explore the world but be careful, you may enter a chunk you did not expect to encounter. End Portal Frames and Spawners remain untouched so you can still beat the game :)

Use Fabric and put the mod in mods folder!
